title: Swiftcraft
description: Swiftcraft is a performance modpack that optimizes the game for a lag-free experience on high & low-end devices.
body:
# 🚀 **SwiftCraft**

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Beta%20v1-orange) 
![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric%2C%20Forge%2C%20And%20Quilt%201.20.+-blue)


---

## 🌟 Overview

SwiftCraft is a performance-optimized Minecraft modpack designed to enhance gameplay smoothness across various devices.

---

## 📊 **Key Features**

### 🔧 **Performance Optimization**
- Enhanced rendering and world generation
- Reduced memory usage
- Improved client and server performance
- Compatibility with **[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)**, **[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/)**, **[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)**, and **[Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/)** for Minecraft 1.20+


---

## ⚙️ **Technical Details**

### **Requirements**
```markdown
✔️ Minecraft: 1.20.+
✔️ Fabric, Forge, or Quilt: Required (Choose your loader)
✔️ RAM: 4GB+ Recommended
```

---

## 📥 **Installation**
1. Download the modrinth launcher
2. Search for **SwiftCraft** in the modpack list
3. Click **Install**
4. Launch and enjoy optimized Minecraft

---

## 🌟 **Development Roadmap**

| **Category**        | **Next Steps**                                  |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| ⚙️ **Performance**   | Continuous optimization for newer Minecraft versions |
| 🔄 **Compatibility** | Support for **Fabric**, **Forge**, and **Quilt** loaders |
| 🐞 **Stability**     | Bug fixes based on community feedback           |

---

## 💬 **Community Engagement**

### **Coming Soon**
* 💬 **Discord Server** – To connect with others
* 📋 **Issue Tracker** – Report bugs and issues (will probably be through the Discord)
* 📚 **Wiki** – Learn about the modpack's features and more (will be created if needed)
* 🔧 **Mod Loader Support** – Continued updates for **[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)**, **[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/)**, **[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)**, and **[Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/)** loaders.
* 📅 **Version Compatibility** – Support for newer and older Minecraft versions.

> *These features will launch when the modpack gains more attraction!*

---

## 🚧 **Development Notes**
* Updates and new features will be published, but I can update more based on community engagement
* Performance improvements driven by user feedback and/or testing

---

## 🎯 **Performance Considerations**
* Optimization may vary by system configuration
* Continuous improvements based on community input
* Regular compatibility updates

---

## 📊 **System Requirements**

| **Configuration**   | **Minimum**           | **Recommended**       |
|---------------------|----------------------:|----------------------:|
| **Resolution**      | 1080p                 | 4K                    |
| **FPS**             | 60 fps                | 120 fps               |
| **RAM**             | 2 GB                  | 4 GB+                 |
| **Graphics**        | Integrated Graphics   | Dedicated GPU         |

---

## 🏎️ **Performance Benchmarks**

### 💻 **Laptop (1080p)**
| **Settings**        | **32 RD/SD**          | **16 RD/SD**          |
|---------------------|----------------------:|----------------------:|
| **Min FPS**         | 87                    | 64                    |
| **Avg FPS**         | 91                    | 144                   |
| **Max FPS**         | 95                    | 155                   |
| **TPS**             | 20                    | 19                    |

**Laptop Specifications:**
* **Processor:** AMD Ryzen 7 4800H
* **Memory:** 16GB RAM
* **Graphics:** NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 Ti (4GB VRAM)

---

*Not Tested on 4k*

*RD: Render Distance, SD: Simulation Distance*

### Ingame Screenshot with MakeUp - Ultra Fast shaders on 32 RD/SD 1080p laptop:

![Ingame Screenshot with FPS and TPS in left corner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H6Hak1KP/images/2cb95d06a5b26b264247027639a8da10cf464848.png)

---

## 🕹️ **Older Version Support?**
If there's demand, I’d be happy to create versions of **SwiftCraft** for older Minecraft versions! Let me know if you'd like to see this, and I’ll work on it! 😄

---

## *Comprehensive Overview of Mods, Resource Packs, and Shaders:*
